objective: Rearchitect ctxindex search around capability-based adapters: indexed (full local FTS5), federated (provider-side search), and hybrid (bounded local hot set + federated long tail). Amend SPEC/V1 doctrine, extend the adapter contract with a declared mode and optional search capability, turn core search into a planner that merges local FTS5 and federated results, and rework google.mailbox to hybrid mode (bounded metadata window sync, live Gmail search, on-demand hydration), dissolving the M8 bounded re-list gap. local.directory stays indexed and unchanged. All existing gates (typecheck, lint, unit, integration, e2e, verifiers incl. network-egress) stay green.
